brief.idea: Turn any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph so newcomers can grasp its architecture without reading every file.
brief.problem: Onboarding into an unfamiliar codebase is slow and intimidating; engineers must reverse-engineer structure from scattered files.
brief.why: It packages a heavy LLM analysis pipeline behind a one-command plugin and renders results in a polished dashboard, lowering the effort to near zero.
brief.how: LLM sub-agents analyze files in batches and emit a validated JSON graph; a deterministic core validates and fingerprints it; a React dashboard renders it with layered layout.
brief.takeaway: Worth it if you regularly onboard onto large or unfamiliar repos.

continents.title: Architecture
continents.summary: A deterministic core with LLM agents at the edges and a React dashboard on top.

landmarks.name: Schema validator
landmarks.detail: A Zod schema is the single contract.

landmarks.name: React dashboard
landmarks.detail: An interactive web view of the graph.
landmarks.whyItMatters: Lowers onboarding effort to near zero.

continents.title: Modules
continents.summary: Analyzer agents, the schema contract, and the dashboard.

landmarks.name: Batch file analyzer
landmarks.detail: Reads files in batches and emits JSON.

continents.title: Workflows
continents.summary: Analyze on demand; re-analyze only changed files on commit.

nodes.name: Sourcegraph Cody
nodes.oneLiner: AI coding assistant with codebase context.
nodes.differentiator: Commercial, IDE-embedded, not a static graph.
